task_completion.description: Verify that the image interpolation setting in Weasis is set to 'Nearest Neighbor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Weasis Preferences or Display settings dialog with 'Nearest Neighbor' selected for the image interpolation option.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default zoom mode in Weasis is set to 'Best Fit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Weasis Preferences or Display settings dialog with 'Best Fit' selected for the default zoom mode.

task_completion.description: Verify that the overlay font size in Weasis is set to at least 16pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Weasis Preferences or Display settings dialog with the font size set to 16 or a higher number.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the viewer was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file manager window, or terminal output confirming the creation of 'prefs_verification.png' in the '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the text file was created with the correct configuration lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal command showing the creation of '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_changes.txt' containing exactly three lines: 'interpolation=nearest', 'zoom=bestfit', and 'font_size=X' (where X is the integer >= 16 chosen in the settings).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Weasis GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Weasis application interface and its preferences dialog being used, rather than just terminal commands editing backend configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the saved screenshot is genuinely of the Weasis viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The process of saving 'prefs_verification.png' should capture the actual Weasis interface with a loaded CT scan, not a blank image, random screen crop, or unrelated window.

integrity.description: Verify the text file was actually created by the agent through standard tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing or echoing the required text into a file using a text editor or terminal, rather than the file magically appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected text file must be exactly at '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_changes.txt' and contain three lines: 'interpolation=nearest', 'zoom=bestfit', and 'font_size=X' (where X is an integer of at least 16). The expected screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/prefs_verification.png'.
